en_title: PlayStation Plus Game Catalog for June 2026 Headlined by Final Fantasy 16 and Kingdom Come: Deliverance
cn_title: 《PlayStation》《最终幻想16》《天国：拯救》领衔6月PS Plus游戏阵容
subtitle: 分批上线新尝试
opus_summary: 索尼公布6月PS Plus游戏目录，新增《最终幻想16》《天国：拯救》《黑色沙漠》《索尼克×夏特 世代重启》《模拟农场25》《奇异人生：双重曝光》《烈焰之刃》等作品。美、英、日试行分批上线，其余地区6月16日入库。

paragraphs.en: PlayStation Plus subscribers have several blockbuster games to look forward to this month, as Sony has revealed its Game Catalog additions for June 2026.
paragraphs.cn: PlayStation Plus订阅用户本月将迎来多款大作，索尼已公布2026年6月的游戏目录新增阵容。

paragraphs.en: Beginning this month, subscribers in the U.S., UK, and Japan will see games added to the subscription on a staggered basis, rather than being all available at the same time. This is the same approach as on Xbox Game Pass, and is being trialled in these countries first. Outside of those three countries, all games will be available on June 16.
paragraphs.cn: 从本月起，美国、英国和日本的订阅用户将看到游戏分批上线，而非一次性全部推出。这与Xbox Game Pass的做法相同，并首先在这三个国家试行。在这三个国家之外，所有游戏将于6月16日统一入库。

paragraphs.en: Headlining the lineup for PlayStation Plus Extra and Premium this month is Square Enix's blockbuster role-playing game Final Fantasy 16, so you can while away the hours again until the upcoming Final Fantasy 7 Remake Revelation finally arrives next year. This will also be joined by Kingdom Come: Deliverance, giving you a taste of RPG action without any magic or dragons.
paragraphs.cn: 本月PlayStation Plus Extra和Premium的领衔作品是史克威尔艾尼克斯的大作《最终幻想16》，让你在明年《最终幻想7 重制版》到来之前再次消磨时光。一同加入的还有《天国：拯救》，让你体验没有魔法和龙的RPG动作。

paragraphs.en: The role-playing continues in Pearl Abyss' open-world MMORPG Black Desert, and there's also Sonic X Shadow Generations, if you're into that kind of thing. Fancy something a little more chilled out? Farming Simulator 25 is on hand to cater to all your agricultural dreams.
paragraphs.cn: 角色扮演之旅继续，还有Pearl Abyss的开放世界MMORPG《黑色沙漠》，以及《索尼克×夏特 世代重启》。想要更轻松的游戏？《模拟农场25》随时满足你的农业梦想。

paragraphs.en: Young adult narrative adventure series Life is Strange is meanwhile offering up its penultimate title, Double Exposure, which is a fun romp if you don't think too much about its timey-wimey plot. Rounding out the list is Blades of Fire, an action-adventure game from Castlevania and Metroid Dread studio MercurySteam.
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，青年叙事冒险系列《奇异人生》推出了其倒数第二部作品《双重曝光》，如果你不去深究其时间错乱的情节，这会是一次有趣的冒险。压轴的是《烈焰之刃》，一款来自《恶魔城》和《密特罗德 生存恐惧》开发商MercurySteam的动作冒险游戏。

paragraphs.en: And finally, PlayStation Plus Premium subscribers can get retro with PlayStation 2 rhythm game hero Gitaroo-Man, which lands on PS4 and PS5 for the first time.
paragraphs.cn: 最后，PlayStation Plus Premium订阅用户可以怀旧一把，体验PS2节奏游戏《吉他小子》，该作将首次登陆PS4和PS5。

paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。你可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系他，或在Bluesky上找到他。
